blocks.text: Khushoo is the state of humility, focus, and presence of heart before Allah during prayer. It is the soul of Salah.
To achieve Khushoo, one must understand what they are reciting and remember that they are standing before their Lord.

1. Perform Wudu carefully.
2. Arrive at the prayer spot early.
3. Minimize external distractions.
4. Pray at a deliberate, slow pace.
Khushoo is a skill that develops with practice and sincere effort. Don't be discouraged by stray thoughts; gently redirect your heart back to Allah.
